roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
/CAL APD MTR, DOP/CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP 04-20-12/OB ADM REV/SHER/NB/S19/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS A WITNESS IN THE TRIAL IN D29,/

/CAL:MOTION FOR TRANSPORT TO PROGRAM/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT SIGNS A TRANSPORTORDER/X:SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN WALDEN HOUSE, A LIVE-IN TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM MAY RESULT IN A LOSS OF CREDIT FOR TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM,/X:DEFENDANT'S RELEASE WILL BE ARRANGED THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S ALTERNATIVE PROGRAM DIVISION,/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:80/CTORD:CJ SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN DRUGTREATMENT PROGRAM, IF FAILS PROGRAM, NO CTS/RESTV/PF500NEW/DNACOMP/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/CTORD:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 4 - 11352(A)HS SHALL BE THE SAME AND RUNS CONCURRENT WITH COUNT 3 - 487(C)PC/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/X THE PEOPLE AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, PC 487(C), A FELONY, ANCOUNT 4, HS 11352(A), A FELONY/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3,4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 10-06-11/REMA/ARBUCKLE/VD:09-23-11 PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 08-04-11/987,2/BAIL:75,000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:04-20-12/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 28 DAYS /ADDL CTS:28/PROB EXT: 10-23-14 /
/CAL: SUPP REPT ON APD MTR/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, /CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP /
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:402 HEARING NOT REQUIRED/DAWT/
/CAL:BAIL MOTION/X:DEFENSE'S MOTION TO VACATE THE $20,000 BAIL GRANTED,/X:DEPARTMENT 22'S NO BAIL ORDER STANDS,/CONTD:STATUS/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIM HEARING/X:SUBP CAD TAPE RELEASED TO PD, FEINLAND/STWPX/CONTD:9-08-11 S23, ERP10/CONTD:9-23-11 M10, PRELIM HEARING/DOP/
